# Hyperfolio - HyperEVM DeFi Portfolio Tracker

> Hyperfolio is a free, open-source multi-wallet portfolio tracker for the HyperEVM blockchain (Hyperliquid ecosystem).

## What is Hyperfolio?

Hyperfolio allows users to track their cryptocurrency portfolios across multiple wallets on the HyperEVM blockchain. It provides real-time monitoring of tokens, NFTs, DeFi positions, and transaction history.

## Key Features

- **Multi-Wallet Tracking**: Connect and monitor multiple wallet addresses simultaneously
- **Token Balances**: View real-time token balances with USD valuations
- **NFT Collections**: Browse and manage NFT holdings
- **DeFi Positions**: Track lending, staking, and liquidity positions across protocols
- **Transaction History**: View complete transaction history with detailed information
- **Portfolio Analytics**: Visualize portfolio performance with charts and statistics
- **Hypercore Integration**: Native support for Hypercore ecosystem protocols

## Supported Blockchain

Hyperfolio exclusively supports the HyperEVM blockchain, which is part of the Hyperliquid ecosystem. HyperEVM is an EVM-compatible Layer 1 blockchain.

## Technical Details

- Built with Next.js 15 and React
- Uses Server Components for optimal performance
- TypeScript for type safety
- Tailwind CSS for styling
- Wagmi for wallet connections

## API Access

Hyperfolio provides a public API for developers. Documentation is available at https://api.hyperfolio.xyz/docs

## Contact

- Website: https://hyperfolio.xyz
- Twitter/X: https://x.com/stableAPY
- API Docs: https://api.hyperfolio.xyz/docs

## Usage

1. Visit https://hyperfolio.xyz
2. Add your HyperEVM wallet address
3. View your complete portfolio across all tracked assets

## Privacy

Hyperfolio is a read-only portfolio tracker. It does not require wallet connections for viewing. Simply enter a public wallet address to view holdings. No private keys or seed phrases are ever requested.
